vocab.meaning: có khiếu trồng cây/mát tay chăm sóc cây cối
vocab.example: My grandmother had a real green thumb, and she helped me grow my first batch of tomatoes in the backyard.

vocab.meaning: đơm hoa kết trái/mang lại kết quả thành công
vocab.example: It took months of patient watering before my little apple tree finally started to bear fruit.

vocab.meaning: diệt trừ mầm mống từ đầu (thường nói về sâu bệnh hoặc cỏ dại)
vocab.example: I had to be very observant to nip any pest infestations in the bud before they ruined my rose bushes.

vocab.meaning: tươi như hoa/tràn đầy năng lượng
vocab.example: I remember seeing the morning glory flowers looking fresh as a daisy every time I woke up early to water them.

vocab.meaning: diễn biến tốt đẹp/thành công rực rỡ
vocab.example: I was worried the soil wasn't rich enough, but in the end, my little garden project came up roses.

vocab.meaning: đứng núi này trông núi nọ
vocab.example: I used to think the grass is always greener on the other side when I saw my neighbor's giant sunflowers compared to mine.

vocab.meaning: người (hoặc cây) nở muộn/phát triển muộn
vocab.example: One of my lilies was a bit of a late bloomer, only opening its petals weeks after all the others had finished.

vocab.meaning: ủng hộ/cổ vũ cho ai đó (hoặc thứ gì đó) phát triển
vocab.example: Every day after school, I would check on my fragile bean sprout, really rooting for it to survive the heavy rain.

vocab.meaning: ngôn ngữ hoa mỹ/chải chuốt (dùng khi tả về vẻ đẹp của cây)
vocab.example: I don't mean to use flowery language, but the scent of the jasmine I grew was truly intoxicating.

vocab.meaning: người nhút nhát/ngại ngùng (ẩn dụ về những loài cây ưa bóng râm)
vocab.example: Unlike the bold sunflowers, the delicate violets I planted were a bit like shrinking violets, hiding under the larger leaves.
